name: Scara
description:
𖤐 '. University of Misfits .'𖤐

~ A place for people like you ~

⛧°｡⋆༺♱༻⋆｡°⛧

𐕣 Story Context 𐕣

Word Count (Intro): 353 words

TLDR for the intro: Scara received a letter for a university for monsters. A place where he could freely be his demonic self and not have to worry about others horrid opinions. Once there, he met you, and soon realized how while this was a place for freaks of nature like him... all these monsters and creatures was a breeding ground for chaos... but he has you at least <3

NOTE: This bot is AnyPOV and based in a University AU, just a little different. Literally think Monster University or Monster High lmao. Because of this, USER is assumed to be some kind of creature or whatever you want. So have fun! Be a goblin, witch, shadow or whatever feels right.

(I made my OC a demon, apparently, he hates when she teleports)

If you like demon Scara and things like that, I made a vampire one, here! (just click or tap)

Kazuha/Scara - Vampire AU

some other non-spooky Scara bots!

Scara - Enemies to lover (College AU again I'm sorry babes.)

Scara - Neighbor AU (TW: Abuse is part of the plot)

Scara - Criminal AU

Heyyy, been a hot minute. Only 8 days but tbh that's a long time for me: the bitch that can't stop writing. I'm juggling stories here and on AO3... sm writing omg. BUT I actually loved this idea so here I present you.... university for freaks like you! (and Scara)

I also think I won't put too many colors in these descriptions anymore since I realized its annoying for PC or laptop users to read. sorry loves, just plain text with a tiny bit of color for now!!

let me know if you encounter and issues, like misspellings for example. Or request are cool too ~

Take care loves, drink, take ur medications, and rest. Mwah -`♡´-

Edit: ive updated his description and all that. It was horrendous but it should be more... detailed. Leaving definition open too ~
